name: course-docs-site
description: Shared site runtime for metyatech course documentation

scripts.build:verified: npm run sync:content && cross-env COURSE_DOCS_SKIP_BUILD_LINT=1 COURSE_DOCS_SKIP_BUILD_TYPECHECK=1 next build && npm run pagefind
scripts.typecheck: npm run sync:content && next typegen && tsc --noEmit
scripts.test: npm run test:e2e-config && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/admin-mode-route-protection.test.mjs tests/import-asset-resolution.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-clears-next.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-link-mode.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-remote-cache.test.mjs tests/tutorial-shots.test.mjs tests/tutorial-shot-editor-flow.test.mjs && node scripts/test-e2e-matrix.mjs
scripts.test:shared: npm run test:e2e-config && node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/admin-mode-route-protection.test.mjs tests/import-asset-resolution.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-clears-next.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-link-mode.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-remote-cache.test.mjs tests/tutorial-shots.test.mjs tests/tutorial-shot-editor-flow.test.mjs
scripts.test:dev-switch: node --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/dev-switch.test.mjs tests/admin-mode-route-protection.test.mjs tests/import-asset-resolution.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-clears-next.test.mjs tests/sync-course-content-does-not-touch-source.test.mjs tests/submissions-route-source.test.mjs tests/mdx-boundary-source.test.mjs tests/e2e-content-source.test.mjs tests/intro-image-resolution.test.mjs tests/qspec-relative-image-resolution.test.mjs tests/asset-route-trace-config.test.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build:verified
scripts.verify:course: npm run lint && npm run test:course && npm run build:verified
